result.text:
Monster prompt.

Name:
Night Hunter.

Concept:
cave-dwelling scavenger.

Family:
beast.

Role:
lurker.

Environment:
Enclosed frontier basin beyond the western pass. A lawless region of roaming Uruk tribes, Gitz clans, unstable magic, and dangerous wilderness where settlements rarely endure.

Appearance:
fungal bloom across hide or flesh, body marked by old traps, arrows, or scavenged metal.

Behavior:
seems to remember old routes or rituals, avoids larger threats while preying on the isolated.

Special:
moves unnaturally silently for its size, can burst from brush, ditch, ruin, or stockade gaps.

STYLE:
painted british comic encounter illustration, gritty graphic novel action scene, heavy ink outlines, thick painterly brush strokes, high contrast saturated colors, dramatic composition, immediate tension, layered action, dark fantasy encounter art.

---
